description: This pipeline exports input data via a standard exporter, generating a directory containing the output file(s), and then passes this output to another component without modifying it, effectively creating a simple data processing workflow that involves data export and unchanged data transfer.

eeacc4d5-7635-4651-b01c-2294f8d402d6.name: export-data-by-parameter-v2
eeacc4d5-7635-4651-b01c-2294f8d402d6.description: Exports the input data via JIPipe's standard exporter. The output is the directory that contains the generated file(s).

cbff27ba-e83f-4323-9a70-d85a2dda8974.name: io-interface
cbff27ba-e83f-4323-9a70-d85a2dda8974.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.
